statistics.extraction_notes: D203 covers 6 BLUE NODEs (Dev, Research, Productivity, Content, Quant, Trading), MCP/A2A protocols (K-001~K-068), NODE lifecycle, CORE-NODE interface, tool_call_registry, and differentiation ideas. D204 covers Brain Engine modularization, HAL, LLM serving engines, ToolRegistry, infra combos (V1/V2/V3), monitoring/logging, CI/CD, data pipelines, and infrastructure extension ideas.
